zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Hughes於1610年出生在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾時，他的父親Thomas Hughes21歲，母親Margaret Blanche Perrey14歲。他於1634年12月1日與Ellinor Semple在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾利安盧根結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1687年11月20日在威爾士丹比爾利安善南享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Hughes于1610年出生在威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾时，他的父亲Thomas Hughes21岁，母亲Margaret Blanche Perrey14岁。他于1634年12月1日与Ellinor Semple在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾利安盧根结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1687年11月20日在威尔士丹比爾利安善南享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hughes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of Hugh with genitival or excrescent -s.
Irish and Scottish: adopted as an equivalent of Gaelic surnames based on the personal name Aodh ‘fire’, for example Ó hAodha, Mac Aodha; see McCoy and compare McHugh .

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. en.lifeSummary: When Richard Hughes was born in 1610, in Montgomeryshire, Wales, his father, Thomas Hughes, was 21 and his mother, Margaret Blanche Perrey, was 14. He married Ellinor Semple on 1 December 1634, in Llanllugan, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 20 November 1687, in Llansannan, Denbighshire, Wales, at the age of 77.

Il a épousé Ellinor Semple le 1 décembre 1634, à Llanllugan, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 20 novembre 1687, à Llansannan, Denbighshire, Galles, à l’âge de 77 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Hughes(이)가 1610년 웨일스 몽고머이실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Hughes(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Blanche Perrey(은)는 14세였다. 그는 1634년 12월 1일 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르 랜루건에서 Ellinor Semple(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1687년 11월 20일 웨일스 덴비그h실르 랜산아에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Hughes родился в 1610 г. в местности монтгомиришир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Thomas Hughes было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Blanche Perrey, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellinor Semple 1 декабря 1634 г. в местности лланллуган, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 20 ноября 1687 г. в местности ллансаннан, денбаишир, Уэльс в возрасте 77 лет.
